notes.content:
Plan (Task 5.1): create preamble generator (`src/preamble.rs`).
- `generate_typed_preamble<S: Signature>(variable_descriptions: &str) -> String`.
- Combines instruction text, output schema description, and variable description blocks into DSPy-parity preamble.

title: Task 5.1: Create preamble generator
